name: Sensitive disclosure warning
about: Read this before reporting sensitive incidents, private evidence, credentials, exploit details, or field observations.
title: "Sensitive disclosure guidance"
labels: ["sensitive-disclosure"]
---

# Do not post sensitive material in a public issue

Please do **not** use a public GitHub issue to submit:

- credentials, tokens, secrets, or private keys;
- private screenshots, private messages, or proprietary logs;
- personal data or identifying information;
- exploit details that require coordinated handling;
- unredacted AI interaction evidence;
- sensitive incident reports or field observations that may belong in VIGIL or another non-public pathway.

If you can safely report the issue without sensitive material, open the most relevant issue form and include only redacted, public-safe information.

If the sensitive content is necessary to understand the report, use the repository's non-public disclosure/contact pathway instead.
